title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Nagpur-based team.

About Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates:
Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates!
